messages.content:
Hi.  I have a reservation with you tomorrow for 6 people.  Just wanted to check you will be open as seen a few places closed this week now.  Thanks,
Chris

Sure, we can change that for you.
By the way, we are primarily a pub so you can get your drinks from us too!
Great thanks.  My phone number is 07855620978.  Is it ok to extend to 6 people please?
Could you provide me with your phone number?

Hi Chris, 

I have booked you in for 19:45. As for drinking beforehand, thereâs a store next door to us called berenjak !
Hi there.  Looking to get a booking for 5 at 7.45 on 16th December please.  Also is there an area we can drink beforehand?  Thanks, Chris
